prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical social-media storyboard image for a short video ad about a football fan getting ready on match day and applying sunscreen.

Canvas: Vertical 9:16 composition, warm cinematic apartment lighting, realistic lifestyle photography look. Split the image into exactly 4 horizontal storyboard rows labeled SHOT 1, SHOT 2, SHOT 3, and SHOT 4. Each row has a black instruction sidebar on the left taking about one quarter of the width, with the corresponding cinematic frame on the right. Use thin divider lines between rows. Add bold white italic subtitle-style text over the bottom of the video frames where specified.

Subject details: A young woman with medium skin tone, dark hair in a messy bun, small gold hoop earrings, wearing a red Portugal football jersey with green trim and a large white number 7. The back of the jersey reads RONALDO above the number 7. Her face is anonymized with a smooth brown rectangular blur in shots where her face is visible. She carries a black sling bag in the leaving-home scene.

Shot count and exact content:
1. SHOT 1, time 0:00–0:04: Interior apartment mirror shot. The woman stands in front of a tall rounded mirror, checking her Portugal #7 Ronaldo jersey, fixing her hair, and making finger-guns at her reflection with a grin. Warm bedroom/apartment decor, plants, a framed Ronaldo poster in the background. On-frame subtitle: Match day. Let’s go. 🇵🇹⚽
2. SHOT 2, time 0:04–0:08: Rear tracking shot from behind as she walks to the apartment door in slow motion, wearing the jersey with RONALDO and 7 visible, black sling bag on shoulder, right hand opening the door handle. No on-frame subtitle.
3. SHOT 3, time 0:08–0:11: Door opens to extremely bright sunlight. She squints, raises one hand to block the sun, looks upward, and mouths “Oh no.” Strong lens flare and sunburst from outside, city buildings faintly visible. On-frame subtitle: That sun is NOT it ☀️😬
4. SHOT 4, time 0:11–0:15: Sunscreen application sequence composed of exactly 3 side-by-side visuals within the right frame: left visual shows her holding sunscreen and applying cream to her face confidently; middle visual is a clear product close-up of a tube labeled mamaearth Vitamin C Daily Glow Sunscreen, SPF 50 PA+++; right visual is a macro close-up of a green-capped sunscreen tube squeezing white cream onto fingertips. On-frame subtitle across the bottom: Mamaearth SPF — match day essential 🌿

Left sidebar text: For each row, include white uppercase headings and compact production notes. SHOT 1 sidebar: “SHOT 1”, “0:00–0:04”, “ACTION / DIALOGUE: Checks jersey, fixes hair, finger guns mirror, grabs sling bag.” “CAMERA / MOVEMENT: Front mirror shot, slight push-in.” “TEXT ON SCREEN: ‘Match day. Let’s go. 🇵🇹⚽’”. SHOT 2 sidebar: “SHOT 2”, “0:04–0:08”, “ACTION / DIALOGUE: Walks to door in slow motion, opens it.” “CAMERA / MOVEMENT: Tracking from behind, slow motion.” “TEXT ON SCREEN: (none)”. SHOT 3 sidebar: “SHOT 3”, “0:08–0:11”, “ACTION / DIALOGUE: Squints at sunlight, looks at arms, looks up, mouths ‘Oh no.’” “CAMERA / MOVEMENT: Push-in as door opens, lens flare.” “TEXT ON SCREEN: ‘That sun is NOT it ☀️😬’”. SHOT 4 sidebar: “SHOT 4”, “0:11–0:15”, “ACTION / DIALOGUE: Pulls out Mamaearth SPF, shows it, squeezes cream, applies on face confidently.” “CAMERA / MOVEMENT: Close-up to macro product + application.” “TEXT ON SCREEN: ‘Mamaearth SPF — match day essential 🌿’”. Highlight the text-on-screen quotes in warm yellow.

Visual style: Realistic ad storyboard, sharp but cinematic, warm golden light, cozy apartment plants and wooden furniture, shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, high-quality product photography for the sunscreen tube. Keep the layout clean and readable, with no watermark and no extra shots beyond the 4 specified rows.
